name: Number of Scheduled Blocks
description: Sets the number of block types in a block schedule system. If you don't have a block schedule, keep this at 1.

name: Dark Elements
description: Sets the colors of the darkest parts of the app.

name: Somewhat Bright Elements
description: Sets the colors of the medium-brightness parts of the app.

name: Light Elements
description: Sets the colors of the lightest parts of the app.
